SHORT NAME: PTPAYAMT 

LONG NAME: PTNT_PAY_AMT

LENGTH: 13 

SOURCE: PDE 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: Field length expanded from 10 to 13 in 2025. Three other variables measure payments that are made
